properties.titulo_evento: How conflict in Congo, Sudan and Yemen is fueling the spread of disease
properties.descricao: Whether fast-spreading cholera in Sudan and Yemen or the Ebola virus in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC), outbreaks of disease tend to be especially deadly when they take hold amid armed conflict.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Merz, Macron plan closer nuclear cooperation
properties.descricao: Germany is expected to soon take part in a nuclear drill with France, Germany's Merz said after meeting France's Macron. It comes as Franco-German ties face an unclear future as French elections loom. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran's oil supply threat extends beyond Strait of Hormuz

properties.titulo_evento: New Bundesliga broadcasting deal in the US: Reach over money
properties.descricao: The Bundesliga has a new home on American screens after Germany's top football league left ESPN. The new deal is a sign of the times.

properties.titulo_evento: China: Landslide buries buildings, traps people
properties.descricao: State media has reported at least 8 deaths and a further 34 people missing after a landslide in southwest China. Rescue efforts are ongoing.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: US hits bridges as Tehran retaliates across region
properties.descricao: The US launched a sixth night of strikes on Iran, with Tehran saying attacks on bridges killed several people. Iran has fired retaliatory strikes on US targets across the region. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany massively expands federal police powers
properties.descricao: The German government has increased the powers of its federal police, especially in the use of AI, surveillance and drone defenses. But experts warn of constitutional challenges.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany may make it illegal to deny Israel's right to exist
properties.descricao: Germany's upper house of parliament, the Bundesrat, has introduced a bill seeking to ban the questioning of Israel's right to exist. It is now up to the lower house to decide whether to turn it into law.

properties.titulo_evento: US slaps 25% tariffs on Brazil with election looming
properties.descricao: The US will impose a 25% tariff on most imports from Brazil starting later this month. It's the first action in the Trump administration's new tariff strategy, after the Supreme Court struck down its prior impositions.

properties.descricao: Kachka takes over for Vsevolod Chentsov, who will become deputy prime minister for European integration.

properties.descricao: The strikes aim to prevent Russia from supplying fuel to the occupied regions of Eastern Ukraine and Crimea and curb its effort to circumvent sanctions.
